'''Dadrus''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] that was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by five [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. It was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Marcellus system]], which resided in the [[Marcellus Nebula]]. Dadrus circled the [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Star/Legends|sun]] [[Marcellus]].<ref name="Mists" /> The [[Gas/Legends|gas]] giant, along with the rest of the Marcellus [[Star system/Legends|system]], was located in the [[Meerian sector/Legends|Meerian sector]]<ref name="AtlasCorr" /> of the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="Atlas" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="AtlasCorr" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dadrus was mentioned in ''[[Planet of the Mists]]'', a [[1992]] adventure supplement authored by [[Nigel D. Findley]] and published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Mists" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Marcellus system,<ref name="Atlas" /> and therefore Dadrus, in grid square N-6.<ref name="AtlasCorr" />
